creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

please describe to me exactly what changes after graphics/librsvg2 is
installed. I've never had that port installed and I never ran into any
errors. Please tell me which filetypes got an icon only displayed when
the port is installed.
Nice would be two screenshots of your thunar showing one directory with
librsvg2 installed and one without.

 Greetings, Oliver
